text: Social Impact | Visa Social Impact: Building an equitable future We enable people and businesses to prosper so our shared humanity, communities and planet can thrive. Social Impact: Building an equitable future We enable people and businesses to prosper so our shared humanity, communities and planet can thrive. Our investments Uplifting everyone, everywhere through knowledge and skill-building tools for equitable access to trusted, convenient ways to move money. Partners in our global collaborative community Financial education resources This global digital platform, powered by Visa, delivers free-to-use education resources to help small and micro business owners start, manage and grow their businesses. Women-led business empowerment This Visa Foundation partnership helps financially empower millions of women-led micro and small enterprises globally. Kenyan micro-business support Our partnership with Hand in Hand provides more than 10,000 micro businesses in Kenya – 75% of which are women-owned – with access to business and financial skills education, and broadened access to financial services. UMKM Bisa! Visa partnership with Gojek in Indonesia to provide small and microbusiness owners with online lessons and resources to help them maintain and grow their businesses. Village Capital Visa Foundation partnership to support accelerators working to close the financing gap facing underserved entrepreneurs in Latin America, with a focus on food and agriculture innovation. International Fund for Agricultural Development Visa Foundation partnership creating employment opportunities for rural youth in Africa by designing a network of innovative and integrated agribusiness hubs to build entrepreneurial capacity and technical/managerial skills. TechnoServe Visa Foundation partnership to strengthen the gender diversity of local farmer cooperatives in India and their institutional capacity to make them resilient to economic shocks. IFundWomen Global partnership to help women entrepreneurs secure the funding they need through a series of grant contests and providing access to expert business coaching. Kiva Visa Foundation partnership to increase financial access for underserved small and microbusinesses, wherein Visa employees help designate microloans to the participant businesses. Practical Money Skills Global free educational resource powered by Visa to empower individuals to take control of their finances. I Can Manage My Money Visa partnership with UNDP and Habitat in Turkey to offer training sessions on financial concepts and budget management to enable individuals to use financial tools and services. Inclusive Fintech 50 Collaborative partnership that annually leverages a competitive process to identify 50 early-stage fintechs driving financial inclusion worldwide.
